commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=53783c05801e450e4b7de4441f417c959090f984)
commands.review_summary:
The PR strips provider `apiKey` values from generated `models.json` output and adds regression coverage for plaintext config keys, merge-mode plaintext keys, and SecretRef markers.

Reproducibility: yes. from source: current `main` serializes merged provider entries into `models.json`, and a plaintext configured or existing `apiKey` can flow into `plan.contents`. I did not run the regression test locally because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: Maintainers need to decide the secure upgrade path for existing `models.json`-only credentials and require contributor real behavior proof before merge.

target.title: fix: strip plaintext model api keys from models json
target.body:
Summary
- Strip plaintext provider apiKey values from generated models.json before prompt-visible serialization.
- Preserve SecretRef/env-managed markers and known non-secret auth markers.
- Add regression coverage for configured plaintext keys, existing merge-mode models.json plaintext keys, and SecretRef markers.

Refs #11829

Verification
- pnpm format:check src/agents/models-config.plan.ts src/agents/models-config.applies-config-env-vars.test.ts
- node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.core.json src/agents/models-config.plan.ts src/agents/models-config.applies-config-env-vars.test.ts
- node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/agents/models-config.applies-config-env-vars.test.ts src/agents/models-config.merge.test.ts --passWithNoTests=false
- pnpm tsgo:core
- pnpm tsgo:core:test

Real behavior proof
Behavior addressed: Generated models.json no longer persists plaintext provider apiKey values from active config or old merge-mode models.json entries.

Real environment tested: Windows 11/PowerShell, Node v23.11.0, pnpm 11.1.0, local OpenClaw source checkout.

Exact steps or command run after this patch:
- pnpm format:check src/agents/models-config.plan.ts src/agents/models-config.applies-config-env-vars.test.ts
- node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.core.json src/agents/models-config.plan.ts src/agents/models-config.applies-config-env-vars.test.ts
- node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/agents/models-config.applies-config-env-vars.test.ts src/agents/models-config.merge.test.ts --passWithNoTests=false
- pnpm tsgo:core
- pnpm tsgo:core:test

Evidence after fix: Regression tests assert omitted apiKey fields and absence of plaintext secret strings in plan.contents while preserving the CUSTOM_PROVIDER_API_KEY SecretRef marker.

Observed result after fix: Commands exited 0; generated provider JSON omits plaintext apiKey values and keeps SecretRef marker.

What was not tested: Full suite, live gateway/model provider calls, and cross-platform Testbox/Crabbox proof.
target.author: kzics

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
